Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Important Verses in Bhagavad Gita

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-10-15 · 6 answers
Is there a list of important verses in the Gita that a devotee should memorize? No doubt all verses are important, but if a devotee would like to know which verses to memorize for preaching, is there a priority list?
user [179] · 2007-10-15
depending on the table at night, contents.
i will like to corroborate some important for the devotees; which is in followin, Chapter 2 Text 7. plus, PURPRTS.

check it out for your owns. Hari BOl !!

Suryavanshi:
this time I did it for you, but the idea is the user does the job.
click on attachment, browse for the desired file. then save your question by clicking "add your comments"
